【Forwarded】MVC Marketing Specialist Recruitment
                                                    
                                                        Medigen Vaccine Biologics Corporation(MVC) is a Taiwanese company focused on vaccine research and development and biotechnology innovation, dedicated to improving public health and expanding its international footprint. 🌏 Currently, Advanced Vaccines is actively expanding into the Southeast Asian market, responding to growing regional healthcare needs and strengthening its presence in Southeast Asia and its global competitiveness.
Join us and build your key career strengths in the rapidly growing biotechnology industry. 💪

【Title】
Marketing Specialist (Vietnam Market)

【Key Responsibilities】

	
		Event Planning & Execution: Assist in planning and executing product marketing and medical-related activities, including logistics coordination, liaison with relevant departments, and preparation of materials.
	
	
		Market Reporting: Regularly compile summary reports on Vietnam market progress and major marketing activities for internal reference.
	
	
		External Representation: Represent the company at medical conferences and external networking events in Vietnam.
	
	
		Relationship Management: Maintain professional partnerships with medical institutions and experts in Vietnam to support ongoing collaborations.
	
	
		Market Intelligence: Track disease trends and relevant market information; provide timely updates to assist in adjusting marketing strategies.
	
	
		Operational Support: Support administrative and communication tasks to ensure a smooth distribution process for products from Taiwan to Vietnam.
	


【Requirements】

	
		Language Proficiency: Fluent in English and Vietnamese. Candidates with intermediate or higher proficiency in Chinese (Mandarin) are preferred.
	
	
		Educational Background: Degree in Biomedical Sciences, Pharmaceuticals, Nursing, or related fields. Bachelor’s or master’s degree holders are welcome; relevant professional experience is highly preferred.
	
	
		Travel: Ability to travel to Vietnam as required by business needs.
	
	
		Target Candidates: We welcome 2026 graduating students or Vietnamese professionals currently residing in Taiwan to apply.
	


【More Information】

	
		Headcount：1 position
	
	
		Location：Medigen Vaccine Biologics Taipei Office (Address：4F., No. 508, Sec. 7, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Nangang Dist., Taipei City)
	
	
		Related News: MVC's ENVACGEN® is Granted First Enterovirus A71 Vaccine Marketing Authorization in Vietnam; Joins Forces with Substipharm Biologics to Expand Southeast Asian Market
	


【Application Method (Choose one)】

	
		Submit via 104 Job Bank.
	
	
		E-mail CV to HR Janice: janicelai@medigenvac.com

03
                                    Settling Into CGU: A Dual-Degree Student's Guide to Campus Life
                                    2025.07.09
                                    
                                        
                        
                        
                        Hey Folks! Let me introduce myself, I am a student of Chang Gung University on a Dual Degree Program. Yes, I am still in bachelor study and I need to finish 2 years of study here in Chang Gung University. To give you a clear picture of my situation, I am a student doing a study in two different universities. My home university is Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember (Indonesia), where I completed my first and second years before coming to Taiwan for my third and final year.

Due to that program, I am able to enjoy my time in CGU and that’s what I did when I first got here. CGU provides the best facility for its students. From the public transport, modern class, library, student activity room, cinema, even a museum for its study to enjoy. I only know about these facilities on the internet. However, when I arrived at this campus, my expectation was fulfilled. These facilities are very good and help me to adapt very quickly. I even feel like I’m not going abroad, as the people here are nice, the facility is good, and the food is perfect. But the main reason on my adaptation process is this campus facilities.

The learning system here also matches with my learning method. I often feel bored when there is a lecture that lasts more than 2 hours. But here, the system where you can have a 10 minutes rest in each hour, it is jaw-dropping for me. Not gonna lie, at first, I’m in awe, because I can keep focus until the very last minute of the class. 

I think you will face the same experience as me when you first come to this beautiful campus. However, it will be good for you if you have insider tips about Chang Gung University. Worry not! I am here to give you tips so that you can adapt easily in a short time.

My first suggestion is to explore the campus. You need to know Chang Gung University until the very edge of this campus. You need to do this before the first week of semester starts, so then you won’t feel confused when you want to go to your class. Even though there is an English description in front of class, still, if you don’t explore it first, you will have a hard time finding your class.

My second suggestion is to use the campus facilities, especially the library. CGU library has 5th floor, and each floor has different functionality. The 1st floor is the lobby, here is the location of the library administrator. If you want to borrow or return a book, this is the floor you'll be looking for. The 2nd floor is the publication floor, it is filled with thesis of a graduate student. The 3rd and 4th floor is the reading section, the difference is the 3rd floor contains Chinese written literature, whereas the 4th floor is written in English. If you are an international student, 4th floor is your comfort place to study. Finally, the 5th floor, it is the floor where enjoyment is at the max, especially if you are addicted to movies. Here, You can rent a room with your friends and play a movie that is provided by the library. There are a bunch of great movies provided here. If you want to relax for a bit but don’t have time to go outside campus, this is the best place to go.

My third suggestion is to join all activities held by the Office of International Affairs (we call it OIA). OIA acts as a support for the international student, they provide campus tour, gathering, vacation, even part-time opportunities. OIA uses outlook or gmail to share information, so be sure to check your email regularly.

These three suggestions are the reason why I can comfortably study here without many issues. Adapting also becomes easier as the campus provides the best service and support for me. To end this article, I think no matter who you are, you will find yourself comfortable on this campus. Trust me, this campus will make your study even more enjoyable yet still have high quality of learning.
